name: notion
description: Official Notion API integration with complete curl-based workflow. 8 operations: search, get page, get blocks, create page, query database, create database, update properties, add blocks. Supports API v2025-09-03 with data_sources migration. Rate limits and payload constraints documented.
review: Excellent Notion API skill from the trusted openclaw monorepo supporting the latest API v2025-09-03 with data_source migration. All operations include complete copy-pasteable curl examples. Rate limits (3 req/s, 429 handling) and payload limits (100 blocks, 500KB) thoroughly documented. Highly demanded integration with broad workflow applicability.
